meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Finish Your SaaS MVP Faster
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your SaaS development. Use this Antigravity project template and Claude Code workflow to ship your MVP in record time. Intermediate guide.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates decision fatigue by enforcing a modular, feature-first architecture. By pairing this scaffold with Claude Code’s autonomous execution, you bypass boilerplate hell, maintain strict state management, and force your MVP toward a deployable, revenue-generating state rather than getting lost in endless refactoring cycles.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a graveyard of half-finished repos—abandoned side projects that promised to be the next big SaaS but died under the weight of feature creep and architectural indecision. The vision is clear, but the implementation is a black hole where time, motivation, and capital go to vanish.

It doesn't have to be this way. The difference between a serial tinkerer and a successful founder is the ability to ship. The Antigravity framework isn't just code; it’s a velocity-focused scaffolding designed to strip away the noise so you can focus exclusively on the logic that makes your product worth paying for.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a hardened, production-ready directory structure that separates concerns immediately, preventing the 'spaghetti code' trap.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project using the Antigravity modular architecture, including pre-configured Auth, Stripe integration, and a PostgreSQL Prisma schema.

steps.title: Define the Revenue-Generating Core
steps.description: Identify the one feature users will pay for and isolate it from secondary UI clutter.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create the core business logic service for [Feature Name] in a dedicated domain layer, ensuring it is decoupled from the UI components.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate domain logic for payment-gated feature'

steps.title: Automate Type-Safe API Contracts
steps.description: Stop manual debugging by enforcing strict API contracts between your frontend and the backend.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust TRPC router for the core feature, ensuring all inputs and outputs are strictly validated with Zod schemas.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate trpc router with zod validation for core service'

steps.title: Implement the 'Fast-Follow' UI
steps.description: Use the template's component library to build the interface without reinventing the wheel.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard view for the core feature using Antigravity UI components, ensuring accessibility and mobile-first design.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'build dashboard view using existing ui library components'

steps.title: Deploy to Production Loop
steps.description: Configure the CI/CD pipeline to ensure that every code push is a potential production release.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the deployment pipeline for Vercel, including environment variable management and automated smoke tests.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'configure vercel ci/cd pipeline and environment variables'

pro_tips: Treat your database schema as the single source of truth; use Antigravity to sync types to the frontend automatically.
Never write raw SQL; leverage the template's ORM abstraction to maintain velocity while ensuring data integrity.
If a feature takes more than 4 hours to build, break it into two smaller, independent modules.
Use Claude Code's terminal context to run automated tests after every single file modification.
Prioritize 'delete' over 'refactor'—if code isn't contributing to core value, remove it immediately to reduce cognitive load.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, focus on the 'Build-Measure-Learn' loop: gather 10 user sessions, identify the biggest friction point, and use the Antigravity template to iterate within 24 hours.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for your hard drive and start building for your customers. You have the framework, the tools, and the path to profitability. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
